message:
feat(web): add dynamic OG images for social sharing

Complete overhaul of Open Graph and social sharing:
- Add dynamic opengraph-image.tsx and twitter-image.tsx for root, flywheel, and learn pages
- Create dynamic icon.tsx (32x32) and apple-icon.tsx (180x180) for app icons
- Update layout.tsx with improved metadata, title templates, and SEO configuration
- Replace static JPG OG images with dynamic Edge-runtime PNG generation
- Design features: dark gradients, glowing orbs, flywheel visualization, agent badges
- All images use brand colors (cyan #22d3ee, purple #a855f7, pink #f472b6)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,123 @@ +import { ImageResponse } from "next/og"; + +export const runtime = "edge"; + +export const size = { + width: 180, + height: 180, +}; +export const contentType = "image/png"; + +export default function AppleIcon() { + return new ImageResponse( + ( +
+ {/* Subtle glow behind icon */} +
+ + {/* Flywheel icon */} + +
+ ), + { + ...size, + } + ); +}

@@ -3,32 +3,25 @@ import type { Metadata } from "next";
 const siteUrl = "https://agent-flywheel.com";
 
 export const metadata: Metadata = {
-  title: "The Flywheel - Agent Flywheel",
+  title: "The Flywheel",
   description:
     "Ten interconnected tools plus utilities that enable multiple AI agents to work in parallel, review each other's work, and make incredible autonomous progress while you're away.",
   openGraph: {
     title: "The Flywheel - 10 Tools for 10x Velocity",
     description:
-      "Ten interconnected tools that enable multiple AI agents to work in parallel. Using three tools is 10x better than one.",
+      "Ten interconnected tools that enable multiple AI agents to work in parallel, coordinate automatically, and make autonomous progress. Using three tools is 10x better than one.",
     type: "website",
     url: `${siteUrl}/flywheel`,
     siteName: "Agent Flywheel",
-    images: [
-      {
-        url: "/og-flywheel.jpg",
-        width: 1200,
-        height: 1000,
-        alt: "The Agent Flywheel - 10 Tools Working Together",
-      },
-    ],
+    // Images auto-generated from opengraph-image.tsx
   },
   twitter: {
     card: "summary_large_image",
     title: "The Flywheel - 10 Tools for 10x Velocity",
     description:
-      "Ten interconnected tools that enable multiple AI agents to work in parallel. Using three tools is 10x better than one.",
-    images: ["/og-flywheel.jpg"],
+      "Ten interconnected tools that enable multiple AI agents to work in parallel and make autonomous progress.",
     creator: "@jeffreyemanuel",
+    // Images auto-generated from twitter-image.tsx
   },
 };

@@ -0,0 +1,278 @@ +import { ImageResponse } from "next/og"; + +export const runtime = "edge"; + +export const alt = + "The Flywheel - 10 Interconnected Tools for 10x Velocity with AI Coding Agents"; +export const size = { + width: 1200, + height: 630, +}; +export const contentType = "image/png"; + +// Tool definitions with their colors +const tools = [ + { name: "NTM", color: "#22d3ee", desc: "Orchestration" }, + { name: "Agent Mail", color: "#a855f7", desc: "Coordination" }, + { name: "UBS", color: "#f472b6", desc: "Bug Scanner" }, + { name: "Beads", color: "#22c55e", desc: "Task Tracking" }, + { name: "CASS", color: "#f59e0b", desc: "Session Search" }, + { name: "CM", color: "#3b82f6", desc: "Memory" }, + { name: "CAAM", color: "#ec4899", desc: "Auth Manager" }, + { name: "SLB", color: "#14b8a6", desc: "Safety" }, + { name: "DCG", color: "#ef4444", desc: "Guard" }, + { name: "RU", color: "#8b5cf6", desc: "Repo Sync" }, +]; + +export default async function Image() { + return new ImageResponse( + ( +
+ {/* Radial grid pattern */} +
+ + {/* Large glow behind flywheel */} +
+ + {/* Main content */} +
+ {/* Header section */} +
+ {/* Badge */} +
+ + The Dicklesworthstone Stack + +
+ + {/* Title */} +

+ The Flywheel +

+ + {/* Subtitle */} +

+ 10 Tools for 10x Velocity +

+
+ + {/* Tools grid - circular arrangement */} +
+ {tools.map((tool, i) => ( +
+ + {tool.name} + + + {tool.desc} + +
+ ))} +
+ + {/* Footer tagline */} +
+ + + Multiple agents in parallel + + • + Cross-agent coordination + • + Autonomous progress +
+
+ + {/* Bottom gradient accent */} +
+ + {/* URL */} +
+ agent-flywheel.com/flywheel +
+
+ ), + { + ...size, + } + ); +}

-    "Claude",

-    "Gemini",

-        height: 829,
-        alt: "Agent Flywheel - AI Agents Coding For You",
-      },
-    ],

+    // Images are auto-generated from opengraph-image.tsx

   twitter: {
     card: "summary_large_image",
     title: "Agent Flywheel - AI Agents Coding For You",
     description:
-      "Transform a fresh VPS into a fully-configured agentic coding environment. Claude, Codex, Gemini + 30 dev tools. Free & open-source.",

+      "Transform a fresh VPS into a fully-configured agentic coding environment in ~30 minutes. Claude, Codex, Gemini + 30 dev tools. Free & open-source.",
     creator: "@jeffreyemanuel",
+    site: "@jeffreyemanuel",
+    // Images are auto-generated from twitter-image.tsx
+  },
+  robots: {

   },
 };

+ + {/* Glowing orbs */} +
+

+ {/* Header */} +

+ ACFS Learning Hub +

+ + {/* Subtitle */} +

+ Master Agentic Coding +

+

+ {categories.map((cat, i) => ( +

+
+

+ ))} +

+
+ ), + { + ...size, + } + ); +}
